use_cases: Page-level backgrounds for landing pages and marketing sites
Section dividers or content containers with subtle visual depth
Hero section backgrounds with vignette focal points
Card or modal backgrounds with themed dot patterns
Full-bleed decorative overlays for immersive web experiences
ai_summary: A decorative SVG-based background component that renders a configurable dot pattern with optional vignette radial gradient and inner glow effects. Built with React and SVG patterns for crisp rendering at any resolution. Supports full customization of dot size, spacing, colors, and effect intensities via props.
